baseline_findings.finding: Existing About block did not contain blocker-level false version, release, desktop, runtime, or private-reference claims.
Settings tests already rejected several release/readiness overclaims.
Settings/About render path did not perform package, git, or runtime fetches.
Synthetic private-path strings exist only in redaction tests and are not UI trace leaks.

post_change_self_audit.finding: About surface now explicitly states readonly metadata, local control layer, web design preview, not packaged/local preview, source not exposed, CLIProxyAPI boundary, and desktop owner-gated.
Test coverage now asserts the new boundary copy and forbids additional fake release/package/browser metadata claims.
